items.name: accordion
items.description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that reveal or hide associated content.

items.name: alert
items.description: Displays a callout for user attention.

items.name: avatar
items.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

items.name: badge
items.description: Displays a badge or a small count/label.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.description: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links.

items.name: button
items.description: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button.

items.name: calendar
items.description: A date calendar component for selecting dates.

items.name: card
items.description: Displays a card with header, content, and footer.

items.name: checkbox
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

items.name: dialog
items.description: A modal dialog that interrupts the user with important content.

items.name: icon
items.description: Renders an icon from Iconify (via @iconify/vue) or a custom Vue component.

items.name: input
items.description: Displays a form input field or a textarea.

items.name: kbd
items.description: Displays keyboard shortcuts.

items.name: label
items.description: Renders an accessible label associated with a form control.

items.name: menu
items.description: A dropdown menu for displaying a list of actions or options.

items.name: pagination
items.description: Pagination with page navigation, next and previous links.

items.name: popover
items.description: Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button.

items.name: progress
items.description: Displays an indicator showing the completion progress of a task.

items.name: radio-group
items.description: A set of checkable buttons known as radio buttons where no more than one can be checked at a time.

items.name: select
items.description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from.

items.name: separator
items.description: Visually or semantically separates content.

items.name: skeleton
items.description: Used to show a placeholder while content is loading.

items.name: slider
items.description: Allows the user to select a value from a range with a slider.

items.name: switch
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

items.name: table
items.description: A responsive table component for displaying tabular data.

items.name: tabs
items.description: A set of layered sections of content that display one panel at a time.

items.name: tag
items.description: Tag component for categorizing or markup.

items.name: textarea
items.description: Displays a form textarea for multi-line text input.

items.name: toast
items.description: A succinct message that is displayed temporarily.

items.name: tooltip
items.description: A popup that displays information related to an element when the element receives keyboard focus or the mouse hovers over it.
